name: Cheeseburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion together in a pan until the beef is fully cooked through.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan, then set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the milk, beaten eggs, shredded cheddar cheese, oregano, and black pepper.
4. Add the cooled beef mixture to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Pour the filling into an unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-40 minutes, or until set and lightly golden on top.
NOTE: If you do not have a pie crust, you can use a greased baking dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray instead.
